zh.lifeSummary: John Foyle於1550年出生。他於1570年6月20日與ALICE Froude在英國多瑟特卡恩結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1587年5月8日在英國英格蘭多瑟特卡恩享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Foyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Normandy called La Feuillie (from Latin folia + -ata ‘leafy place, wood’), either in Seine-Maritime or Manche. According to MacLysaght, it has been established in Ireland since the 13th century, at first in Dublin, later in Leix.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Foyle Farm in Oxted, Surrey, recorded as Foyllye, la Foily in 1418. A name of French origin, La Foyl(y)e was partially Anglicized as the Foyl(y)e, shown by early surname forms. One suggestion is that this is derived from Old French fouille ‘excavation’. While this is formally possible, there is no evidence for the term in Middle English or as a placename in northern France. More likely it has the same origin and meaning as 1 above, and was given by an owner of Norman descent, perhaps in imitation of one of the places called La Feuillie in Normandy.

variants.name: Foiles
meanings: Probably English or Scottish, a topographic name for someone livingby two or more pits (see   Foyle  ).

variants.name: Foil
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Foyle  .

variants.name: Voyles
meanings: Welsh: variant of Voyle, a nickname from a lenited form of moel ‘bald’. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John Foyle was born in 1550. He married ALICE Froude on 20 June 1570, in Cann, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 8 May 1587, in Cann, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: John Foyle est né en 1550. Il a épousé ALICE Froude le 20 juin 1570, à Cann, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1587, à Cann, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Foyle wurde 1550 geboren. Er hat am 20. Juni 1570 in Cann, Dorset, England ALICE Froude geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1587 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Cann, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: John Foyle è nato il nel 1550. Lui sposato ALICE Froude il 20 giugno 1570, nel Cann, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 8 maggio 1587, nel Cann, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Foyleは1550年に生まれた。1570年6月20日にイギリスドールセトカンでALICE Froudeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1587年5月8日にイギリスイギリスドールセトカンで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Foyle(은)는 1550년 태어났다. 그는 1570년 6월 20일 영국 도르세트 캔에서 ALICE Froude(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1587년 5월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 캔에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Foyle nasceu em 1550. Ele casou-se com ALICE Froude em 20 de junho de 1570, em Cann, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1587, em Cann, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Foyle родился в 1550 г. Он женился на женщине по имени ALICE Froude 20 июня 1570 г. в местности канн, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 8 мая 1587 г. в местности канн, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Foyle nació en 1550. Se casó con ALICE Froude el 20 de junio de 1570, en Cann, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1587, en Cann, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
